What we sharpen

Two tools.
One standard.

Nail Nippers

Cuticle nippers and nail cutters restored to factory-level sharpness. Every edge is tested before it leaves our hands.

Precision Restored
Scissors

Manicure scissors, sewing shears, and grooming scissors — sharpened with the precision your craft demands.

Professional Grade
Fair Pricing

No hidden fees. Quality sharpening that's accessible to every nail tech, seamstress, and home user in the region.

Always Transparent

How it works

Three ways
to reach us.

01
Drop Off in Hamilton

Bring your tools directly to us. Quick turnaround — most orders ready same day or next day.

02
Pickup & Delivery

We come to you. Available in select areas — contact us to check availability in your city.

03
Mail-In Service

Ship your tools via Canada Post. We sharpen and return them right to your door — anywhere in the region.
